'''''Star Wars Annual'' 1979''' was a hardcover comic book released in the United Kingdom that collected two stories originally published as [[Star Wars (1977) 13|''Star Wars'' (1977) 13]] and [[Star Wars (1977) 14|''Star Wars'' (1977) 14]].<ref name="SW.com" />

Both stories were first printed in the UK in [[Star Wars Weekly 25|''Star Wars Weekly'' 25]] & ''[[Star Wars Weekly 26|26]]'' and [[Star Wars Weekly 27|''Star Wars Weekly'' 27]] & ''[[Star Wars Weekly 28|28]]''<ref name="SW.com" />
